/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/Paint_Module.dir/modules/anshdeep/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Paint_Module.dir/modules/anshdeep/src/Canvas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Paint_Module.dir/modules/anshdeep/src/Algorithms.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Paint_Module.dir/modules/anshdeep/src/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Paint_Module.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Paint_Module.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Paint_Module.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Paint_Module.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Paint_Module.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Paint_Module.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Paint_Module.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o Paint_Module  -lglfw -lGLEW -lGL -lm -ldl -lpthread
